value.body:
Found during a direct Node API audit of runtime source (`packages/**/src`, excluding tests, scripts, vendor, and generated protocol files).

Problem:
The shared agents package reads `process.env`, `process.platform`, global `crypto`, and `Buffer` from runtime code. This bypasses the Effect services already used for filesystem/path/process spawning in the resolver.

Evidence:
- `packages/agents/src/executables.ts:65` defaults `mergePathValues` platform to `process.platform`.
- `packages/agents/src/executables.ts:89-90` reads `process.env.SHELL`.
- `packages/agents/src/executables.ts:195-199` merges captured env with `process.env`.
- `packages/agents/src/executables.ts:464-515` defaults resolver platform/env to `process.platform`/`process.env`.
- `packages/agents/src/detection.ts:18-20` defaults detection env to `process.env`.
- `packages/agents/src/providers/codex/client.ts:39-50` merges request env with `process.env`.
- `packages/agents/src/providers/codex/app-server/runtime.ts:289-300` merges app-server env with `process.env`.
- `packages/agents/src/providers/codex/constants.ts:7` and `packages/agents/src/services/UnsupportedAgentService.ts:27` call global `crypto.randomUUID()`.
- `packages/agents/src/providers/codex/app-server/runtime.ts:567` decodes base64 with `Buffer`.

Suggested remediation:
- Introduce a narrow agent runtime context for env/platform and provide it at Node entrypoints, or thread env/platform explicitly through all public APIs.
- Use `Crypto.Crypto.randomUUIDv4`/equivalent for generated IDs.
- Replace `Buffer` base64 decoding with a shared portable codec.
- Keep existing option-based overrides for tests, but remove global defaults from shared helpers.

Acceptance criteria:
- Shared agents runtime source no longer reads `process.env`, `process.platform`, global `crypto`, or `Buffer` directly.
- Agent provider detection and Codex env assembly remain behaviorally equivalent under desktop/API callers.
- Tests cover env/platform injection for macOS/Linux/Windows cases.

frontmatter.title: Inject agent runtime env, platform, and crypto instead of reading Node globals

value.title: Inject agent runtime env, platform, and crypto instead of reading Node globals
